shots.visual: 外出独自带娃：近景口播/问题特写
shots.copy: Middle-of-the-night feeds and milk still not warm enough?
shots.notes: Hook shot opening, nighttime nursery bedroom feeding, sharp close-up of portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, metallic purple band with nurture wise branding, white studio product reference product hero on bedside table, separate baby bottle beside it, cinematic soft light, subtle push-in, no person face, no medical claim, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style. USAGE: rechargeable insulated milk-warming thermos cup (cylindrical cup body), separate from baby bottle; pour milk INTO the cup to warm, then pour warm milk OUT into baby bottle for feeding; FORBIDDEN: placing baby bottle inside the cup, bottle-in-cup warming, submerging bottle in cup; not a bottle-in-warmer device. Mood: Middle-of-the-night feeds and milk still not warm enough?

shots.visual: 外出独自带娃：呈现痛点（外出没热水、温度忽高忽低、手忙脚乱）
shots.copy: No convenient hot water when baby wakes up hungry.
shots.notes: Dim nursery bedroom at night, cold milk in baby bottle beside bedside table, separate portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, metallic purple band with nurture wise branding, white studio product reference on nightstand, soft shadows, slow push-in, no person face, no medical claim, USAGE: rechargeable insulated milk-warming thermos cup (cylindrical cup body), separate from baby bottle; pour milk INTO the cup to warm, then pour warm milk OUT into baby bottle for feeding; FORBIDDEN: placing baby bottle inside the cup, bottle-in-cup warming, submerging bottle in cup; not a bottle-in-warmer device, 9:16 USAGE: rechargeable insulated milk-warming thermos cup (cylindrical cup body), separate from baby bottle; pour milk INTO the cup to warm, then pour warm milk OUT into baby bottle for feeding; FORBIDDEN: placing baby bottle inside the cup, bottle-in-cup warming, submerging bottle in cup; not a bottle-in-warmer device

shots.visual: 外出独自带娃：奶倒入恒温杯加热，再倒出到奶瓶（便携可充电设计、多档温控、外出随时加热、保温锁温；产品为可充电加热保温杯（独立于奶瓶，圆柱杯体）；用法：奶液倒入杯内加热保温，再倒出到奶瓶喂哺；禁止：把奶瓶放进杯内、奶瓶插入杯口、奶瓶浸在杯中加热（不是奶瓶暖奶器））
shots.copy: Pour in, even heat inside the thermos cup, then pour out to the bottle.
shots.notes: Product demo, nighttime nursery bedroom feeding, hands pouring milk INTO portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, metallic purple band with nurture wise branding, white studio product reference, then pouring warm milk OUT into baby bottle, USB-C port visible, clear product shape, no person face, no medical claim, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style. USAGE: rechargeable insulated milk-warming thermos cup (cylindrical cup body), separate from baby bottle; pour milk INTO the cup to warm, then pour warm milk OUT into baby bottle for feeding; FORBIDDEN: placing baby bottle inside the cup, bottle-in-cup warming, submerging bottle in cup; not a bottle-in-warmer device. Pour in, even heat inside the thermos cup, then pour out to the bottle.
